items.evidence: README, handoff archive, failure ledger, and all required prereg files found.
items.requirement: Repository identifies the instrument and contains the archived handoff, failure ledger, and prereg files.
Macro report includes GLASSGATE_LIFT with a 95% confidence interval.

items.evidence: D estimates exist for abundant, random, scarce_naive_topk, and scarce_protected.
items.requirement: Macro report includes D estimates for all four workspace arms.

items.evidence: Final report source ledgers and run-all child ledgers verify.
items.requirement: Final report and run-all ledgers verify and preserve replay paths.

items.evidence: Seed detectability and adversarial token AUC are both 0.5 with no camouflage failure.
items.requirement: Seed detectability audit is present and does not fail the current camouflage gate.
Controlled evaluator evolution has at least five epochs.

items.evidence: run-all status is complete_with_deferred_jlens and all child ledgers verify.
items.requirement: The unattended run-all bundle exists and verifies its child ledgers.
Preferred live-provider sequence is recorded without claiming live macro evidence.

items.evidence: J-lens rail frozen with JLENS-FREEZE-001 because exact source/model access is unavailable.
items.requirement: J-lens rail either produces evidence or has a clean failure/defer record.

items.evidence: Bridge rail deferred because the J-lens rail is frozen.
items.requirement: Bridge rail is either run after J-lens survival or cleanly deferred.

items.evidence: Mechanistic admission deferred because the J-lens rail is frozen.
items.requirement: Mechanistic admission rail is either run after J-lens survival or cleanly deferred.

items.evidence: No live model-backed adapter call has been made; checked-in evidence remains no-spend/no-network.
items.requirement: At least one real provider-backed model call has been made and recorded before live evidence is claimed.
